final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a clean, modern, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center suitable for small display sizes
Subject: must include visual elements representing the three content pillars: new energy / electric vehicles, digital/tech products, and everyday lifestyle goods — unified into a single cohesive icon or character
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, energetic, and approachable atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant yet universally harmonious direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and free of symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative or taboo associations in any major culture or religion; must work visually at small sizes (circle-cropped avatar display)
Avoid: must avoid national flags, political symbols, religious iconography, hand gestures with ambiguous cross-cultural meaning, and any single-culture-specific references that could alienate international audiences
